attributes.description: Alerts when per-service 5xx rate exceeds threshold. Service-level error diagnosis.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High 5xx error rate by service

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high 5xx error rate by service

### What fired
Per-service 5xx rate exceeded threshold (min 100 total requests).

### Why it matters
Service-level 5xx indicates problems with the backend instances fronted by that service.

### Triage
1. Check backend health-checks.
2. Inspect deployment state.

### Remediation
- Fix / roll back the backend.

### Tuning
- Tune threshold per SLA.
